title: Sum JSON amounts per user (Snowflake colon access)
prompt: You're writing Snowflake SQL. Each api_logs row has a JSON payload. Using Snowflake's colon path syntax (payload:amount) with a numeric cast, total each user_id's amount across all their log rows. Columns: user_id, total. Order by total descending, then user_id.

generic: SELECT user_id, SUM(CAST(payload->>'amount' AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS total

requires.message: Use Snowflake's colon path syntax (payload:amount), not the ->> operator.

hints: payload:amount reads the amount field out of the JSON; ::decimal(10,2) casts it to a number.
Group by user_id and SUM the cast amounts.
